This form explains the limited liability terms for this residential household move.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is a licensed and insured moving company and will exercise reasonable care while handling Customer property.

Customer understands that moving and transportation services involve inherent risks, including but not limited to scratches, dents, shifting during transportation, breakage of fragile items, and damage resulting from pre-existing conditions, manufacturer defects, weak furniture construction, loose parts, particleboard furniture failure, improperly packed items, or items not identified as fragile or high-value before the move begins.

This form is not an insurance policy and does not provide full replacement value coverage, full retail-value coverage, or additional valuation coverage.

1. Standard Limited Liability

  • Customer acknowledges standard limited liability.

Customer understands that Marlon Moving Services, LLC’s liability, if any, is limited according to the Bill of Lading, Moving Service Agreement & Estimate, Terms & Conditions / Liability Information, applicable tariffs, and applicable law.

Customer understands that standard limited liability does not guarantee full retail replacement value, sentimental value, full replacement cost, or reimbursement for high-value, fragile, sentimental, irreplaceable, improperly packed, or customer-packed items.

2. No Full Replacement Value or Additional Valuation Coverage

Customer understands and agrees that:

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is not providing full replacement value coverage for this move.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is not providing full retail-value coverage for this move.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is not providing additional valuation coverage for this move.

This form is not an insurance policy.

Any additional protection must be obtained separately by Customer before the move begins.

3. Customer Responsibility for Additional Protection

Customer understands that if Customer wants protection beyond Marlon Moving Services, LLC’s standard liability terms, Customer is responsible for obtaining separate insurance or additional protection before the move begins.

Customer understands that Marlon Moving Services, LLC is not responsible for arranging, purchasing, or providing additional insurance coverage on behalf of Customer.

4. Fragile, High-Value, and Irreplaceable Items

Customer agrees to identify fragile, delicate, high-value, sentimental, or irreplaceable items before loading begins.

Customer should personally transport cash, jewelry, firearms, medication, passports, legal documents, financial records, sentimental items, small high-value items, and irreplaceable items whenever possible.

5. Customer Acknowledgment

By signing below, Customer confirms that:

Customer understands this form is not an insurance policy.

Customer understands that moving services involve inherent risks.

Customer understands that Marlon Moving Services, LLC is licensed and insured, but the move does not automatically include full replacement value coverage, full retail-value coverage, or additional valuation coverage.

Customer understands that Marlon Moving Services, LLC’s liability, if any, is limited according to the signed moving documents and applicable law.

Customer understands that any additional insurance or protection must be obtained separately by Customer before the move begins if desired.

Customer agrees to identify fragile, high-value, delicate, sentimental, or special-handling items before loading begins.

Customer Initials: _______
I understand that Marlon Moving Services, LLC’s liability, if any, is limited according to the signed moving documents and applicable law.

Customer Initials: _______
I understand that this move does not automatically include full replacement value coverage, full retail-value coverage, or additional valuation coverage.

Customer Initials: _______
I understand that any additional insurance or protection must be obtained separately by me before the move begins.

Customer Signature: ___________________________________

Printed Name: {{customer.name}}

Date: ______________________

Marlon Moving Services Representative: ___________________________________

Date: ______________________

────────────────────────────────────

UPDATED COPY NOTICE

This updated estimate copy is being provided for Customer records.

Customer has already signed the original estimate. This updated copy confirms that the ${{estimate.deposit_paid}} deposit has been received and will be applied toward the final invoice.

This updated copy also confirms the scheduled move date, arrival window, and corrected estimate details.

No additional customer signature is required unless Customer or Marlon Moving Services, LLC requests a newly signed copy.

────────────────────────────────────

WHY CHOOSE MARLON MOVING SERVICES

  • Licensed & Insured
  • Professional Moving Crews
  • No Travel Time Charges
  • Furniture Protection Included
  • Affordable & Transparent Pricing
  • Trusted Throughout Northern Virginia

────────────────────────────────────

MOVE DETAILS

Thank you for contacting Marlon Moving Services regarding your upcoming move.

We do not charge for travel time. Your billable time begins only when our crew arrives at your home and starts working.

We currently have availability for your requested moving date and would be honored to assist with your relocation.

Crew Size: {{job.crew_size}} Professional Movers

Hourly Labor Rate: ${{job.hourly_rate}} per hour

Truck Service Fee: ${{job.truck_fee}}

Includes:

  • Mileage
  • Moving Blankets
  • Dollies & Equipment
  • Standard Furniture Protection

Minimum Service Time: 3 Hours

  • Furniture

Our team takes great care to protect your belongings and ensure safe transportation throughout the moving process.

PAYMENT TERMS

Deposit Status: PAID

Remaining balance is due upon completion of services unless otherwise agreed in writing.

The deposit will be applied toward the final invoice.

IMPORTANT ESTIMATE NOTICE

{{company.name}}
Business Address: {{company.address}}

Date Issued: June 2, 2026

CUSTOMER INFORMATION
Customer Name: {{customer.name}}
Phone: {{customer.phone}}
Email: {{customer.email}}
Move Date: {{job.scheduled_date}}
Origin Address: {{job.origin_address}}
Destination Address: {{job.destination_address}}

Thank you for considering Marlon Moving Services, LLC. The following Terms & Conditions are provided to help customers understand our moving procedures, responsibilities, and service policies.

────────────────────────────────────

SERVICES PROVIDED

Marlon Moving Services, LLC may provide:

  • Loading Services
  • Transportation Services
  • Unloading Services
  • Basic Furniture Placement
  • Furniture Protection
  • Moving Blankets
  • Dollies & Equipment
  • Packing Services, when requested or approved
  • Optional Packing / Protection Package, when requested or approved
  • Packing Materials, when requested or approved

Additional services may be available upon request and may increase the final invoice if approved by Customer.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC does not unpack boxes unless separately agreed in writing.

────────────────────────────────────

CREW, RATE, AND TRUCK SERVICE FEE

Crew Size: {{job.crew_size}} Professional Movers
Hourly Labor Rate: ${{job.hourly_rate}} per hour
Truck Service Fee: ${{job.truck_fee}}
Minimum Service Time: 3 hours

The truck service fee includes the moving truck, fuel, mileage, moving blankets, dollies, equipment, and standard furniture protection.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC does not charge for travel time. Customer’s billable time begins only when the crew arrives at the home and starts working.

Billable time ends after the last item is unloaded at the destination and the move-related work is completed.

────────────────────────────────────

OPTIONAL PACKING & PROTECTION PACKAGE

Customer may approve the optional Packing & Protection Package for ${{estimate.packing_fee}}.

This package may include professional wrapping and protection for:

  • Furniture
  • TVs
  • Mirrors
  • Pictures and Frames
  • Fragile Items
  • Stretch Wrap
  • Protective Materials
  • Moving Blankets

Customer understands that packing/protection services are intended to help protect items during the move. These services do not create full replacement value coverage, full retail-value coverage, cargo insurance, or additional valuation coverage.

────────────────────────────────────

PAYMENT TERMS

A ${{estimate.deposit_paid}} deposit has been paid to reserve the moving date. The deposit will be applied toward the final invoice.

Final payment is due upon completion of services unless otherwise agreed in writing.

Accepted payment methods may include:

  • Cash
  • Check
  • Zelle
  • Credit Card

Additional labor time, approved materials, additional items, stairs, elevators, long carries, waiting time, access issues, parking issues, or additional requested services may increase the final invoice.

────────────────────────────────────

ESTIMATES

All estimates are based on information provided by Customer at the time of quoting.

This estimate is not a final invoice. Final charges are based on actual labor time, approved materials used, and services performed on moving day.

Final charges may vary based on:

  • Actual labor time
  • Additional items
  • Packing materials used
  • Stairs
  • Elevators
  • Long carries
  • Waiting time
  • Access conditions
  • Specialty items
  • Additional services requested

────────────────────────────────────

CUSTOMER RESPONSIBILITIES

Customer is responsible for:

  • Identifying fragile items
  • Identifying high-value items
  • Identifying sentimental or irreplaceable items
  • Identifying items requiring special handling
  • Securing cash, jewelry, firearms, medication, important documents, passports, financial records, and personal records
  • Personally transporting irreplaceable or small high-value items whenever possible
  • Ensuring reasonable access at pickup and delivery locations
  • Providing parking instructions, elevator information, stair information, building rules, and loading access information
  • Reviewing and signing required moving documents
  • Inspecting visible item condition at delivery before the crew leaves when possible

Customer should personally transport irreplaceable, sentimental, or small high-value items whenever possible.

────────────────────────────────────

CUSTOMER-PACKED BOXES

Customer understands that items packed by Customer may be difficult for Marlon Moving Services, LLC to inspect, verify, or protect internally.

Customer is responsible for properly packing boxes, sealing boxes, labeling fragile boxes, and identifying boxes that require special care.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is not responsible for the internal contents of boxes packed by Customer unless required by the signed moving documents and applicable law.

────────────────────────────────────

DAMAGE REPORTING

Customer should inspect items at delivery.

Any concerns regarding damage or loss should be reported as soon as possible and preferably before the moving crew leaves the delivery location.

Supporting photographs, description of the item, proof of value if applicable, and explanation of the issue may be requested.

Customer understands that claims are subject to the signed Moving Service Agreement & Estimate, Bill of Lading / Moving Contract, Limited Liability Acknowledgment Form, Fragile Items & High-Value Household Items Acknowledgment, Pre-Move Photo / Condition Checklist, Delivery Completion & Final Walkthrough
Form, applicable tariffs, and applicable law.

────────────────────────────────────

FRAGILE, HIGH-VALUE, AND SPECIAL-HANDLING ITEMS

Customer understands that some household items carry increased risk during moving, including but not limited to:

  • TVs
  • Mirrors
  • Glass items
  • Pictures and frames
  • Lamps
  • Artwork
  • Antiques
  • Marble, stone, or granite items
  • Fragile furniture
  • Particleboard or pressboard furniture
  • Customer-packed boxes
  • Items with loose parts, weak joints, worn finish, prior repairs, or pre-existing damage
  • Sentimental, irreplaceable, or high-value items

Customer agrees to identify these items before loading begins.

────────────────────────────────────

LIMITED LIABILITY INFORMATION

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is a licensed and insured moving company and exercises reasonable care in handling Customer property.

Customer understands that moving and transportation services involve inherent risks, including but not limited to scratches, dents, shifting during transportation, breakage of fragile items, damage resulting from pre-existing conditions, manufacturer defects, weak furniture construction, particleboard furniture failure, loose parts, improperly packed items, or items not identified as fragile or high-value before the move begins.

Liability, if any, is governed by the signed Moving Service Agreement & Estimate, Bill of Lading / Moving Contract, Limited Liability Acknowledgment Form, applicable tariffs, and applicable law.

────────────────────────────────────

INSURANCE / ADDITIONAL PROTECTION INFORMATION

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is a licensed and insured moving company.

Customer understands that this move does not automatically include full replacement value coverage, full retail-value coverage, cargo insurance, or additional valuation coverage.

Customer seeking protection beyond the standard liability terms described in the moving documents should obtain any desired additional insurance or protection before the move begins.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is not responsible for arranging, purchasing, or providing additional insurance coverage on behalf of Customer.

────────────────────────────────────

ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTS

Customer may be asked to review and sign:

  • Moving Service Agreement & Estimate
  • Terms & Conditions / Liability Information
  • Bill of Lading / Moving Contract
  • Limited Liability Acknowledgment Form
  • Fragile Items & High-Value Household Items Acknowledgment
  • Pre-Move Photo / Condition Checklist
  • Delivery Completion & Final Walkthrough Form

────────────────────────────────────

CUSTOMER ACKNOWLEDGMENT

By signing below, Customer acknowledges receipt and understanding of these Terms & Conditions / Liability Information.

SCHEDULE

Scheduled Arrival: Tuesday, {{job.scheduled_date}} between 8:00 AM and 9:00 AM.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is scheduled to arrive at the origin location on Tuesday, {{job.scheduled_date}} between 8:00 AM and 9:00 AM.

Service will begin only after Customer approval and signed paperwork. If Customer does not approve the paperwork, estimate, or required forms, no work will begin and Marlon Moving Services, LLC may leave the site without obligation to perform the move.

The goal is to complete loading, transportation, unloading, and basic placement on Tuesday, {{job.scheduled_date}}. If the job requires additional labor time due to item volume, packing needs, access conditions, stairs, elevators, long carries, loading/unloading conditions, travel conditions, waiting time, parking conditions, or other job-related factors, final charges may be adjusted based on actual labor time and services performed

SERVICES PROVIDED

  • Loading
  • Transportation
  • Unloading
  • Basic placement of items as directed

  • Packing, if requested or approved
  • Packing materials as needed and charged based on actual usage

  • Other: ___________________________

Important: Marlon Moving Services, LLC does not unpack boxes unless separately agreed in writing.

SHIPMENT DESCRIPTION

This shipment includes household goods, furniture, boxes, and approved personal property belonging to {{customer.name}}, including but not limited to:

  • Household furniture
  • Boxes and packed personal belongings
  • TVs, mirrors, pictures, and frames
  • Bedroom, living room, dining room, and household items
  • Fragile items identified by Customer before the move
  • Other approved items prepared for transportation

Customer understands that this is a residential household move involving furniture and personal property that may include fragile, delicate, high-value, sentimental, irreplaceable, or special-handling items.

Customer is responsible for identifying fragile, high-value, delicate, sentimental, irreplaceable, or special-handling items before loading begins.

Customer should personally transport cash, jewelry, firearms, medication, passports, legal documents, financial records, sentimental items, small high-value items, and irreplaceable items whenever possible.

CREW, LABOR, AND MOVING CHARGES

Crew: {{job.crew_size}} Professional Movers
Hourly Rate: ${{job.hourly_rate}} per hour
Estimated Time: 7 to 12 hours
Truck Service Fee: ${{job.truck_fee}}
Minimum Service Time: 3 hours

The truck service fee includes the moving truck, fuel, mileage, moving blankets, dollies, equipment, and standard furniture protection.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC does not charge for travel time. Customer’s billable time begins only when the crew arrives at the home and starts working.

Time ends after the last item is unloaded at the destination and the move-related work is completed.

OPTIONAL PACKING & PROTECTION PACKAGE

Customer may approve the optional packing and protection package for ${{estimate.packing_fee}}.

This package may include professional wrapping and protection for:

  • Furniture
  • TVs

LIMITED LIABILITY / PROTECTION NOTICE

Customer has reviewed and received the Terms & Conditions / Liability Information provided by Marlon Moving Services, LLC.

Customer has reviewed and signed, or will be asked to review and sign, the Limited Liability Acknowledgment Form.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC is a licensed and insured moving company and will exercise reasonable care while handling Customer property.

Customer is responsible for identifying any high-value, fragile, delicate, sentimental, irreplaceable, hazardous, leaking, or special-handling items before loading begins.

templates.body_html:
{{company.name}}
Business Address: {{company.address}}
Phone: {{company.phone}}
Website: {{company.website}}
Estimate #: {{job.job_number}}
Date Issued: June 15, 2026
Updated Copy Date: June 15, 2026

────────────────────────────────────

CUSTOMER INFORMATION
Customer Name: {{customer.name}}
Phone: {{customer.phone}}
Email: {{customer.email}}
Move Date: {{job.scheduled_date}}
Origin Address: {{job.origin_address}}
Destination Address: {{job.destination_address}}
Scheduled Arrival Window: {{job.arrival_window}}

This document confirms that Customer understands and accepts the special risks related to moving fragile, delicate, expensive, high-value, sentimental, or special-handling household items.

1. Fragile and High-Risk Household Items

Customer acknowledges that this residential move may include household items that are fragile, delicate, expensive, high-value, sentimental, or vulnerable to damage during loading, transportation, unloading, and placement, including but not limited to:

TVs

Mirrors

Pictures and frames

Glass items

Glass-top furniture

Lamps

Artwork

Antiques

Marble, stone, granite, or specialty furniture

Electronics

Fragile furniture

Particleboard, pressboard, or assembled furniture

Items with loose parts, weak joints, worn finish, or pre-existing damage

Customer-packed boxes

High-value, sentimental, or irreplaceable items

Customer understands that these items may be more likely to scratch, crack, chip, shift, break, loosen, or sustain cosmetic damage during a move, even when reasonable care is used.

2. Customer-Packed Boxes

Customer understands that Marlon Moving Services, LLC is not responsible for the internal contents of boxes packed by Customer unless required by the signed agreement and applicable law.

Customer is responsible for properly packing boxes, sealing boxes, labeling fragile boxes, and identifying boxes that require special care.

Customer should avoid packing fragile, expensive, sentimental, or irreplaceable items inside boxes without clearly notifying the moving crew before loading begins.

3. Furniture Condition and Pre-Existing Damage

Customer understands that furniture may have pre-existing scratches, dents, chips, loose legs, weak joints, worn finish, weakened hardware, prior repairs, or manufacturer defects.

Customer understands that moving assembled furniture, particleboard furniture, pressboard furniture, older furniture, fragile furniture, marble/stone items, glass items, and specialty furniture may carry increased risk.

Marlon Moving Services, LLC may document visible condition with photos or videos before, during, and after the move.

4. Items Customer Should Personally Transport

Customer should personally transport:

Cash

Jewelry

Firearms

Medication

Passports

Legal documents

Financial records

Sentimental items

Irreplaceable items

Small high-value items

Important electronics

Data storage devices

Any item Customer does not want loaded into the moving truck

5. Limitation of Responsibility

Customer understands that Marlon Moving Services, LLC will use reasonable care, standard moving practices, moving blankets, dollies, and standard furniture protection.

However, Customer understands that reasonable care does not guarantee that fragile, delicate, high-value, sentimental, customer-packed, or weakly constructed items will not sustain damage.

Customer understands that this acknowledgment does not create full replacement value coverage, full retail-value coverage, or additional valuation coverage.

6. Customer Acknowledgment

By signing below, Customer confirms that:

Customer understands that fragile and high-value household items carry increased risk during moving.

Customer agrees to identify fragile, delicate, expensive, high-value, sentimental, or special-handling items before loading begins.

Customer understands that Marlon Moving Services, LLC is not responsible for the internal contents of boxes packed by Customer unless required by the signed agreement and applicable law.

Customer understands that pre-existing damage, weak furniture construction, loose parts, particleboard furniture, pressboard furniture, marble/stone items, glass items, or manufacturer defects may increase the risk of damage.

Customer has been advised to personally transport irreplaceable, sentimental, or small high-value items whenever possible.

Customer Initials: _______
Customer understands that fragile, delicate, high-value, and sentimental items carry increased risk during moving.

Customer Initials: _______
Customer agrees to identify fragile, high-value, expensive, or special-handling items before loading begins.

Customer Initials: _______

Customer Initials: _______
Customer has been advised to personally transport cash, jewelry, documents, sentimental items, irreplaceable items, and small high-value items.
